Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions

Class SaveCompanyFileAction

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.SaveCompanyFileAction
public class SaveCompanyFileAction extends Object
Action class responsible for saving the current company's data to persistent storage. This action does not close the company file after saving, allowing the user to continue working with the currently open company.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SaveCompanyFileAction(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
    Constructs and executes the action to save the current company's data.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • SaveCompanyFileAction

      public SaveCompanyFileAction(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage)
      Constructs and executes the action to save the current company's data. This constructor immediately attempts to persist the data associated with the CurrentCompany using the CurrentCompany.persist() method.

      Any exceptions that occur during the persistence process (e.g., IOException, ActionCancelledException, NoFileCreatedException) are caught, and their stack traces are printed to standard error. In a production application, these errors should ideally be communicated to the user via dialogs or other UI feedback.

      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary Stage of the JavaFX application. This parameter is currently not directly used within the constructor's logic but is accepted, potentially for future use in displaying UI feedback (e.g., success/error dialogs related to the save operation).
